vllm.title: [Frontend] OpenAI server: propagate usage accounting to FastAPI middleware layer
vllm.author: agt
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR makes aggregate, per-Request UsageInfo (total prompt/completion tokens) available to the OpenAI API server's FastAPI middleware, e.g. out-of-tree add-ons specified via command-line argument --middleware.
Example use case:
Existing (locally-written) middleware validates API callers via JWT; e

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Ray 2.9.x doesn't expose available_resources_per_node
vllm.author: darthhexx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX: #7584 (comment)
The changes in #7584 resulted in losing Ray 2.9 compatibility, because ray._private.state.available_resources_per_node is not exposed in 2.9.3 and only is from available_resources_per_node from 2.10 onwards.
Ray Serve 2.9.3 error when deploying vLLM 0.5.5 and above:

vllm.title: [CI/Build][Bugfix][Doc][ROCm] CI fix and doc update after ROCm 6.2 upgrade
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR is to fix the CI failures after ROCm 6.2 upgrade, along with minor documentation changes.
Two types of failures were observed and then fixed:
(1) amd-entrypoints-test: failed with OOM: torch.OutOfMemoryError: HIP out of memory. Tried to allocate 224.00 MiB. GPU 0 has a total capacity of 63.9

vllm.title: [Kernel] Fullgraph and opcheck tests
vllm.author: bnellnm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add opcheck tests for all remaining ops and add some more models (and an inductor check) to the torch.compile fullgraph tests.
The new tests uncovered a few issues (schema problems, missing meta-function, etc.) which have been fixed.
The selective_scan_fwd op had a weird schema/behavior.  It returne

vllm.title: [Core] Rename `PromptInputs` and `inputs`, with backwards compatibility
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR re-implements #8673, with backwards compatibility for:

Make the old name PromptInputs still available
inputs keyword argument in various methods of LLMEngine, AsyncLLMEngine and vllm.engine.multiprocessing.

FIX #8673 (comment)

vllm.title: [Frontend] MQLLMEngine supports profiling.
vllm.author: Abatom
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
MQLLMEngine supports profiling.

The profiling-related protocols and APIs from previous versions have been adapted to MQLLMEngine.

vllm.title: [Misc] Support FP8 MoE for compressed-tensors
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Adds support for loading compressed-tensors format MoE models that have been compressed using FP8 per-tensor weights and activations, leveraging the existing kernel
Models tested (GSM8k eval is on the model card):

 Mixtral https://huggingface.co/mgoin/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1-FP8
 DeepSeek https:

vllm.title: Revert "rename PromptInputs and inputs with backward compatibility (#8760)
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This reverts commit 28e1299.
@DarkLight1337 we need to release a new model today and this is causing merge conflicts. Sorry about this and please apply it again after we merge the new model code. 🙇

vllm.title: [Model] Add support for the multi-modal Llama 3.2 model
vllm.author: heheda12345
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for the Llama3.2's vision models.
Currently, we are blocked by a HuggingFace Transformers release after huggingface/transformers#33703
We will make a release as soon as this PR is merged.
Closes #8812
